sāṃsiddhika a.
1 Natural, existing naturally, innate, inherent.
2 Effected naturally, spontaneous.
3 Absolute.
4 Effected by supernatural means.
Comp.
— dravaḥ natural fluidity (opp. naimittika ‘generated’) (belonging to water only).
